step_by_step_thinking: I agree that option D, corticosteroids, should not be used routinely in managing NaOCl accidents. Steroid usage could mask underlying issues like infections or allergic reactions which require appropriate treatment rather than suppression. Additionally, steroids have no direct role in neutralizing the effects of NaOCl on tissues.
